intent: 1BR / 1 bath narrow front-back-split smoke test, no carport. 8x10 lot with standard 2 m setbacks gives exactly the narrow-fp-01 reference plan's 4x6 m envelope (24 m2): bedroom+bath rear band, great room + galley kitchen front band with dining-counter divider and entry into the great room. dirty_kitchen on — kitchen's rear wall is interior (bath behind it), so its exterior service door is on the side wall instead.
must_haves: single common bath behind the kitchen on one plumbing line
side-by-side great room + galley kitchen with dining counter
